chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْبِدَعِ وَ الرَّأْيِ وَ الْمَقَايِيسِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 19 – The innovation, and the opinion, and the analogies

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (186/ 1)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (186/ 1)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) إِذَا ظَهَرَتِ الْبِدَعُ فِي أُمَّتِي فَلْيُظْهِرِ الْعَالِمُ عِلْمَهُ فَمَنْ لَمْ يَفْعَلْ فَعَلَيْهِ لَعْنَةُ اللَّهِ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Jamhour Al Ammiya who said,

‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘When the innovations (heresy) appear in my<sup>saww</sup> community, the scholar should manifest his knowledge. So the one who does not do so, upon him be the Curse of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 2. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Jumhur al-‘Ammi in a marfu‘ manner (rafa ’ahu), from the Messenger of Allah who has said the following. “When innovations emerge it will be obligatory for the scholars to make their knowledge public, otherwise, Allah will condemn them.”
